title: The Changes Nobody Saw
theme: The unseen work of becoming softer.
sceneDescription: The changes nobody saw are quiet reflection: softened light, mirror-like water, and private becoming.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
privacySafeTreatment: Use symbolic environments, silhouettes, partial presence, hands, shadows, reflections, and objects; do not create photorealistic faces.
futureAssetNote: Future artwork slot: stylized watercolor literary-manga / visual-novel scene, privacy-safe, consistent character presence, no photorealistic identity replication.
